refnamediv.refpurpose: Decode OpenCV Zoo NanoDet DNN outputs.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: detections = dnn_decode_nanodet(outputs, imageSize) detections = dnn_decode_nanodet(outputs, imageSize, inputSize, confThreshold, nmsThreshold)

listitem.para: List alternating class-score and bbox-regression tensors for each NanoDet stride level.
Model input size as [width height]. The default is [416 416].
Minimum class confidence. The default is 0.35.
Non-maximum suppression overlap threshold. The default is 0.60.
Structure with fields boxes, scores, and classIds.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: dnn_decode_nanodet converts NanoDet class-score and distribution-regression outputs into image-space detection boxes. It follows the OpenCV Zoo NanoDet post-processing layout using stride levels 8, 16, 32, and 64 with regMax 7 by default.

refsection.title: Examples
